faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for my Rego Park apartment or home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that effectively eliminate wasps while remaining safe for children, pets, and residents. Our technicians take extra precautions in multi-unit buildings common throughout Rego Park.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Rego Park, Queens?
faqs.answer: Rego Park properties commonly experience yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species build nests in building eaves, trees, shrubs, and underground locations. Our experts identify the species and use the most effective removal strategy for each type.
